# Deep Discovery — Validated PR Stack & Implementation Plan

Validation of the proposed deep-discovery decomposition against the actual codebase.
All paths absolute-rooted at the worktree:
`/Users/leeovery/Code/agentic-workflows/.claude/worktrees/explore/`

## Key corrections from reading the code

- **Next migration id is `045`, not `046`.** Last on disk is `044-allow-workflows-mv.sh`. Test goes at `tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`.
- **The session-path move (dd-1) is NOT epic-only.** Single-phase work types read the discovery log directly at a hard-coded path. dd-1 must touch:
  - `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md:165` (`session-001.md`)
  - `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md:147` (`session-001.md`)
  - `skills/workflow-investigation-entry/SKILL.md:122` (`session-NNN.md`)
  - `skills/workflow-scoping-entry/references/invoke-skill.md:21` (`session-NNN.md`)
  This is a real cross-cutting risk to the "unchanged non-epic path." The path moves for everyone; behaviour stays identical.
- **`map-operations.md` has no merge/split ops** (only Remove, Rename, Change-routing, Edit-summary/description, Mark-handled, Reactivate). Merge/split happen only at synthesis in `topic-synthesis.md` §E. Brief-regen-on-merge/split is therefore a synthesis-time concern, not a map-op concern.
- **Rename is fresh-only** (`map-operations.md` §F: "no work has started, no files exist") — so a renamed discovery item has no brief file yet; brief-rename handling is a non-issue at the map-op layer. But once briefs exist and a topic has downstream work, rename is already blocked by the fresh-only guard, so no brief-path migration needed on rename.
- **`knowledge remove --work-unit {name}`** (work-unit cancel, `manage-work-unit.md:236`) removes ALL phases — already covers a new `discovery` phase, no change needed. Per-topic cancel (`epic-display-and-menu.md:734`, `--phase {phase} --topic {topic}`) correctly will NOT touch discovery logs (topic=work_unit there, a log spans topics) — no gap.
- **KB chunk-config is loaded by phase name**: `src/knowledge/index.js:497` → `chunking/{identity.phase}.json`, and `fs.existsSync` guards it (`:498`). So `chunking/discovery.json` MUST exist or indexing a discovery log throws. Confirmed.
- **`deriveIdentity` phase regex is a closed enum** (`index.js:296`): `(research|discussion|investigation|specification|imports|seeds)`. `discovery` must be added there AND a new path branch for `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md → topic = work_unit` (`index.js:331`-ish block). `INDEXED_PHASES` (`:22`) must also gain `discovery`.
- **`conclude-discovery.md` explicitly forbids `knowledge index`** (lines 9-12: "Do not call knowledge index … session logs are journey records"). dd-4 must REWRITE that anti-pattern, not just add a call. This is a load-bearing contradiction with the new design — flag prominently.

---

## 1. Validated Stack

Recommend **6 slices**, not 5. Re-entry continuity splits OUT of dd-2 into its own slice. Briefs stay a single producer+consumer-adjacent slice but the KB-indexing slice is reordered BEFORE downstream so the brief's full-fidelity fallback exists when downstream starts consuming. Final order:

| # | Branch | Depends on | Summary |
|---|--------|-----------|---------|
| 1 | `dd-1-sessions-layout` | main | Move logs `discovery/session-NNN.md` → `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` across ALL refs (epic + 4 non-epic entry points) + `discovery.cjs:findLatestSessionLog`. Migration 045 + test. Pure mechanical move, no behaviour change. |
| 2 | `dd-2-conversation` | dd-1 | Stance fork (epic challenge/sparring + soft-by-location + allow substance), arc-aware nudge replacing the eager STOP gate, medium-fidelity append-only narrative log character. NO re-entry work. |
| 3 | `dd-3-reentry` | dd-2 | Re-entry reads prior session logs (map + recent-in-full + older indexed/KB-on-demand), not just the active log. Shares `session-loop.md` §A and `SKILL.md` "Resuming" with dd-2 — sequenced AFTER to absorb the rebase once. |
| 4 | `dd-4-kb-indexing` | dd-1 | Index discovery logs under a `discovery` phase. `src/knowledge/index.js` + `chunking/discovery.json` + finalize call site + REWRITE `conclude-discovery.md` anti-pattern + bundle rebuild + tests. Branches off dd-1 (needs the `sessions/` path), independent of dd-2/dd-3. |
| 5 | `dd-5-briefs` | dd-3, dd-4 | Harvest produces per-topic briefs (views) at `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md`; manifest `brief_path`; regenerate-on-touch; set downstream `reconcile_needed`. Needs dd-3 (multi-session context to synthesise a complete brief) and dd-4 (KB fallback for late regen). |
| 6 | `dd-6-downstream` | dd-5 | `read-brief-context.md`; research-entry / discussion-entry + init refs consume the brief; `brief_incorporated`; surface `reconcile_needed`. |

### Granularity justification
- **Re-entry split out (dd-3):** It edits the SAME file regions as dd-2 (`session-loop.md` §A open branches, `SKILL.md` Resuming-After-Context-Refresh, `resume-detection.md`). Bundling them makes one giant hard-to-review PR over the most delicate STOP-gate logic in the skill. Splitting lets a reviewer verify the conversation-character change in isolation, then the continuity change in isolation. Cost: one rebase of dd-3 onto dd-2's edits to those files — cheap because dd-3 strictly extends dd-2 (reads MORE logs), it doesn't rewrite dd-2's lines.
- **KB before briefs (dd-4 before dd-5):** The design says the brief's full-fidelity fallback IS the KB-indexed log. dd-5's "late regen pulls older context from KB-on-demand" depends on logs being indexed. Ordering dd-4 first means dd-5 can lean on it. dd-4 is otherwise fully isolated (src/knowledge + bundle) so it can branch off dd-1 directly and merge in any order relative to dd-2/dd-3 — but to keep a single linear stack, base it on dd-1 and merge it before dd-5.
- **Briefs producer+consumer kept as 2 slices (dd-5 / dd-6), NOT 1:** Producer (synthesis writes briefs, manifest tracking, regen) is epic-discovery-internal; consumer (downstream entry skills read the brief, reconcile flagging surfaces) touches a different skill family (research-entry/discussion-entry). Separate review surfaces, separate test surfaces. Two slices is correct.
- **dd-1 stays alone:** A pure path move that touches ~12 files + a migration is exactly the kind of mechanical change that should land first and isolated, so every later slice rebases on the final path.

---

## 2. Per-Slice Task List (file-level)

### dd-1-sessions-layout
Mechanical path move `discovery/session-{NNN}.md` → `discovery/sessions/session-{NNN}.md`. Edit (no new refs):
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/template.md:7` (path-at-line, `{NNN}` rule), `:99-101` (active_session marker note unaffected), header prose.
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/initialize-discovery.md:7` (`mkdir -p .workflows/{wu}/discovery/sessions/`).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/confirm-trigger.md:80` (`mkdir`), `:83` (`session-001.md` path).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/session-loop.md:35` (`session-NNN.md` path).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/confirm-and-persist.md:87` (`git add` path).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/resume-detection.md:40,49` (working-state path, `rm` path).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/document-review.md:26,46,67` (exists-check, re-read, `git add`).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/map-operations.md` lines 204,261,364,417,474,529,582 (7× `git add` paths).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/topic-synthesis.md:13` (Exploration source path).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/first-phase-routing.md` (no explicit path string — Conclusion write goes via session_number; verify no literal).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/show-dismissed.md` (re-invokes discovery; verify no literal session path — grep showed none).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/SKILL.md:56` (Resuming: `session-*.md` glob → `sessions/session-*.md`).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/scripts/discovery.cjs:39` (`findLatestSessionLog` dir join: `path.join(cwd, '.workflows', workUnit, 'discovery', 'sessions')`).
- Non-epic entry points (CRITICAL — unchanged-path guard): `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md:165`, `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md:147`, `skills/workflow-investigation-entry/SKILL.md:122`, `skills/workflow-scoping-entry/references/invoke-skill.md:21`.
- **Migration** `skills/workflow-migrate/scripts/migrations/045-move-discovery-sessions.sh`: for every `.workflows/*/discovery/session-*.md`, `mkdir -p discovery/sessions/` and `git mv`/`mv` the file in. Idempotent (skip if already under `sessions/`). bash 3.2, inline node or pure shell `find`+`mv`, NO manifest CLI. NOTE: this migration moves FILES not manifest fields — `active_session` marker holds only the NNN string, so no manifest rewrite needed; confirm by reading `discovery.cjs` (marker is the number, path is reconstructed).
- **Test** `tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`: happy (file moved into `sessions/`), idempotent (run twice), no-op when already moved, content preservation, multi-work-unit, non-epic work unit with a `session-001.md`.

### dd-2-conversation
- `skills/workflow-discovery/SKILL.md:30-31` ("Stay in your lane" / no-decide) — fork epic vs non-epic stance. Epic: allow substance + soft-by-location; non-epic keeps the thin lane. Keep the table; add the epic carve-out tightly (prose economy — no "(new)" markers).
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/discovery-guidelines.md` §B:41 ("Mirroring, not challenging") and §D:56-63 (hard rules "No decisions, no investigations", "No code/architecture") — fork for epic into collaborative challenge/sparring (opinionated counter-framing, one live thread, NOT interrogation/lecture) and "soft-by-location" decisions. State soft-by-location ONCE here.
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/discovery-guidelines.md` §C:45-54 (Endpoint Detection) and §A "Endpoint observation" — recast eager endpoint into arc-aware convergence nudge (diverge→tension→converge; convergence = "decoupled enough to silo"); ambient, non-blocking, re-enterable.
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/session-loop.md` §C:185-216 — REPLACE the eager "Ready to synthesise?" STOP gate with the ambient arc-aware nudge. Likely extract the nudge/arc-detection logic into a NEW reference file `references/harvest-nudge.md` (convention: extract complex logic rather than inline). §B:162-167 (natural endpoint patterns) updated to arc language.
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/template.md:13,51-56,115-116` — Exploration section character: from "strong-summary prose" → medium-fidelity NARRATIVE record that logs reasoning-moves incl. dead-ends/rejected paths (not verbatim, not strong-summary). Adjust anti-patterns (line 116 "No decisions" must soften for the soft-by-location epic case).
- **NEW reference (recommended):** `references/harvest-nudge.md` for the arc-aware convergence detection + nudge render. Keeps `session-loop.md` §C readable.
- Verify `topic-synthesis.md` rename to "harvest" framing is deferred to dd-5 (synthesis still produces topics here; brief extraction is dd-5).

### dd-3-reentry
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/session-loop.md` §A:33-56 (resume/refresh branch) — read prior session logs (map always + recent session(s) in full + older indexed/KB-on-demand), not only the active log.
- `skills/workflow-discovery/SKILL.md:51-60` ("Resuming After Context Refresh") — extend to read prior logs for continuity.
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/resume-detection.md` — continuity framing (still reads `active_session` marker; the change is what gets loaded once resumed).
- Possibly a NEW reference `references/continuity-load.md` (which prior logs to read in full vs index vs KB-on-demand) — extract rather than inline in `session-loop.md` §A.
- `skills/workflow-discovery/scripts/discovery.cjs` — consider returning a `recent_sessions` list (numbers + paths) so the skill knows which logs exist without re-globbing. `findLatestSessionLog` already finds the dir; extend to `listSessionLogs` returning all numbers. Low-risk additive change.

### dd-4-kb-indexing
- `src/knowledge/index.js:22` — add `'discovery'` to `INDEXED_PHASES`.
- `src/knowledge/index.js:296` — add `discovery` to the phase regex enum.
- `src/knowledge/index.js` ~`:331` block — add a branch: discovery path is `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md`, topic = `workUnit` (a log spans many topics). Parse `sessions/session-\d+\.md`.
- **NEW** `skills/workflow-knowledge/chunking/discovery.json` — mirror `research.json` shape; `"phase":"discovery"`, `"confidence":"low"`, split-on-heading (Exploration/Edits/Topics-Identified are H2). Required or `index.js:498` throws.
- Finalize call site: add `knowledge index .workflows/{wu}/discovery/sessions/session-{NNN}.md` at session finalisation. Best home: `confirm-and-persist.md` §C (after Conclusion finalised) OR a dedicated step. NOTE re-index on EACH harvest (idempotent via `removeByIdentity` at `index.js:628`).
- **REWRITE** `skills/workflow-discovery/references/conclude-discovery.md:9-12` — remove the "Do not call knowledge index" anti-pattern; replace with the new indexing behaviour (or move indexing to confirm-and-persist and have conclude state logs ARE indexed now). Critical contradiction to resolve.
- **Bundle rebuild:** `npm run build` → regenerate `skills/workflow-knowledge/scripts/knowledge.cjs`; commit bundle WITH the src change.
- **Tests:** extend `tests/scripts/test-knowledge-cli.sh` / `test-knowledge-integration.cjs` for discovery-phase identity derivation; add a discovery-path case. Add `chunking/discovery.json` presence assertion (mirror `test-knowledge-build.sh` pattern if it checks chunk configs).

### dd-5-briefs
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/topic-synthesis.md` §E (or a NEW `references/brief-synthesis.md`, recommended — extract per CONVENTIONS) — at harvest, extract each topic's brief (soft decisions + reasoning + rejected paths + open questions) while the whole exploration is in context. Write `.workflows/{wu}/discovery/briefs/{topic}.md`.
- `skills/workflow-discovery/references/confirm-and-persist.md` §A:25-28 — after `create-discovery-topic`, set `brief_path` on the discovery item: `manifest set {wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path "discovery/briefs/{topic}.md"`. Opaque field, no schema change (confirmed `manifest.cjs:849` builder ignores extras; dot-path set works).
- `skills/workflow-manifest/scripts/manifest.cjs:849` builder — OPTIONAL: add `brief_path` to the known builder shape for cleanliness, but dot-path `set` already works so not strictly required. Decide for tidiness.
- **NEW** `references/brief-synthesis.md` — the extraction template + write + regen-on-touch logic.
- Regenerate-on-touch: when a later harvest touches a topic, regenerate its brief (views regenerate freely) and set `reconcile_needed` on the downstream research/discussion item if it already exists. Wire into `topic-synthesis.md`/`brief-synthesis.md`.
- Propagation flag: set `reconcile_needed: true` on `{wu}.{research|discussion}.{topic}` when a regenerated brief post-dates existing downstream work. Opaque manifest field.
- `discovery/briefs/` dir creation in `initialize-discovery.md` (`mkdir -p`).
- **Migration (optional, maybe none):** existing epics have no briefs; briefs are recomputable views generated at next harvest — likely NO migration needed (regen lazily). Decide; if a backfill is wanted it's a separate id 046.

### dd-6-downstream
- **NEW** `skills/workflow-shared/references/read-brief-context.md` — sibling to `seed-context.md`. Reads `{wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path`, reads `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` in full (READ-IN-FULL seed-like role; term "discovery brief" downstream, NOT "seed"). Sets `brief_incorporated`.
- `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md:197-205` (epic branch) — instead of reading `discovery.{topic} description`, load `read-brief-context.md` (brief if present, fall back to description for legacy items).
- `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md:179-187` (epic branch) — same.
- Process-skill init refs: `skills/workflow-research-process/references/initialize-research.md` and `skills/workflow-discussion-process/references/initialize-discussion.md` load `read-brief-context.md` alongside/instead of `seed-context.md` for epic topics.
- Surface `reconcile_needed`: when a research/discussion item has `reconcile_needed: true`, surface a `⚑` advisory at entry (research-entry/discussion-entry display) prompting reconciliation against the regenerated brief — NEVER auto-overwrite. Define where it renders (entry Gather-Context step).
- `brief_incorporated` set after the downstream phase reads the brief (clears the "unread" state).

---

## 3. Risks & Hazards

- **Shared-file churn across dd-2 / dd-3 / dd-5:** `session-loop.md` is edited in dd-2 (§C nudge), dd-3 (§A re-entry), dd-5 (§C harvest→brief). Mitigation: strict ordering (2→3→5) so each rebases once onto the prior; extract new logic into NEW reference files (`harvest-nudge.md`, `continuity-load.md`, `brief-synthesis.md`) so `session-loop.md` edits shrink to Load-directive swaps — minimises line-level rebase conflicts.
- **`SKILL.md` edited in dd-1/dd-2/dd-3:** dd-1 (Resuming path glob), dd-2 (stance lane), dd-3 (Resuming continuity). Different regions, but the "Resuming After Context Refresh" block is touched by dd-1 and dd-3 — keep dd-1's edit to the path string only, dd-3 adds the prior-log read.
- **The unchanged-non-epic-path guard:** dd-1 moves the path for ALL work types (4 non-epic entry points read it). Behaviour must stay identical — only the literal path string changes. Migration 045 must move EVERY work unit's logs incl. single-phase ones (they have `session-001.md`). A missed entry point = broken non-epic seeding. This is the single biggest "could break the unchanged path" risk; verify all 4 non-epic readers + the migration cover single-phase work units.
- **conclude-discovery anti-pattern contradiction (dd-4):** `conclude-discovery.md:9-12` actively forbids `knowledge index`. Must be rewritten, not appended. If left, a reviewer/agent will see contradictory instructions.
- **KB bundle drift:** dd-4 edits `src/knowledge/index.js` — MUST `npm run build` and commit `skills/workflow-knowledge/scripts/knowledge.cjs` in the SAME PR. A src-only PR ships a stale bundle (AGNTC installs the bundle, no build step). Add a CI/check note.
- **chunking/discovery.json required:** `index.js:498` throws if the per-phase config is absent. Ship `discovery.json` in the SAME slice as the `INDEXED_PHASES`/regex change.
- **Migration idempotency (045):** must skip files already under `sessions/`; must not double-move; must handle a work unit with multiple sessions; must not touch non-discovery files. Use a guard `[ -f discovery/session-*.md ]` glob and skip if `discovery/sessions/` already holds them. bash 3.2 (no `mapfile`).
- **Convention traps:** every new user-facing fenced block needs `> *Output the next fenced block as…*`; new reference files need the `*Reference for **[parent](../SKILL.md)***` header + `---`; STOP gates exact `**STOP.**`; arc-nudge must NOT introduce a new STOP gate where the design says "ambient, non-blocking" — careful: the eager gate WAS a STOP; replacing it with a non-blocking nudge means REMOVING a STOP, which interacts with the ZERO OUTPUT / "don't invent stops" rules. Re-read CONVENTIONS §Stop Gates + SKILL.md:40-47 before editing §C.
- **Manifest opaque fields:** `brief_path`, `brief_incorporated`, `reconcile_needed` are opaque (dot-path set works, no schema validation — confirmed). But the `create-discovery-topic` builder (`manifest.cjs:849`) constructs a fixed shape; `brief_path` is set via a SEPARATE `set` call after creation, not via a `--brief-path` flag (unless you add one). Keep it a post-create `set` to avoid touching the builder/validation.

---

## 4. Verification Per Slice

General: NEVER run against the user's real `.workflows/`. Copy a fixture work unit to a temp dir (scratchpad) and run skills/CLI there. Migration/knowledge tests run via the project harness.

- **dd-1:** `bash tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`. Full migration suite (`skills/workflow-migrate/scripts/migrate.sh` against a temp `.workflows/`). Manually: `node skills/workflow-discovery/scripts/discovery.cjs {wu}` against a fixture with logs under `sessions/` — confirm `next_session_number` still computes. Grep that NO `discovery/session-` literal (without `sessions/`) remains: `grep -rn "discovery/session" skills/ src/ | grep -v sessions`.
- **dd-2:** No script tests (skill prose). Exercise in sandbox: copy a fixture epic, run discovery via the engine sandbox (Mint copy per MEMORY), drive an epic discovery conversation, confirm the eager gate is gone and the arc nudge surfaces only at convergence, is non-blocking, re-enterable. Screenshot evidence (TUI paste clips lines).
- **dd-3:** Sandbox multi-session: run two discovery sessions on a fixture epic, refresh context, confirm re-entry reads prior logs (map + recent in full). Confirm `discovery.cjs` `listSessionLogs` returns all numbers.
- **dd-4:** `node build/knowledge.build.js` (or `npm run build`), then `tests/scripts/test-knowledge-cli.sh`, `test-knowledge-integration.cjs`, `test-knowledge-build.sh`. Add a discovery-path identity test. Manually: `node skills/workflow-knowledge/scripts/knowledge.cjs index .workflows/{wu}/discovery/sessions/session-001.md` against a temp store → expect non-zero chunks, `phase=discovery topic={wu}`. Confirm bundle committed (`git status` shows knowledge.cjs).
- **dd-5:** Sandbox harvest: drive an epic to convergence, harvest, confirm `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` written per topic, `brief_path` set on each discovery item, second harvest regenerates + sets `reconcile_needed` on existing downstream items. `node …/manifest.cjs get {wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path`.
- **dd-6:** Sandbox: from a harvested epic, enter research/discussion for a topic, confirm the brief is read in full as the seed and `brief_incorporated` is set; with a `reconcile_needed` item, confirm the `⚑` advisory surfaces and nothing is overwritten.

---

## 5. Gaps (design implies, stack must cover)

- **conclude-discovery anti-pattern rewrite** (dd-4) — already flagged; the stack's dd-4 line "finalize call site" understates that an explicit forbidding instruction must be REMOVED.
- **`reconcile_needed` surfacing UX** — dd-6 must define WHERE/HOW the flag renders at research-entry/discussion-entry (a `⚑` advisory at Gather-Context), and how it clears. The proposed stack says "surface reconcile_needed" without a render location. Covered above; make it explicit.
- **Brief regen on merge/split** — happens at synthesis (`topic-synthesis.md` §E adjust: split/merge/drop), NOT at map-ops. dd-5 must handle: split → write briefs for the new children, drop the parent's brief file + `brief_path`; merge → write one brief for the merged topic, remove the absorbed topics' brief files. The proposed stack's "regenerate-on-touch" covers re-harvest but NOT the merge/split/drop file lifecycle. ADD this to dd-5.
- **Drop lifecycle** — `topic-synthesis.md` §E "Drop" and map-ops Remove must delete the orphaned `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` and clear `brief_path`. dd-5 task.
- **`knowledge remove` on per-topic cancel does NOT touch discovery logs** — correct (logs are work-unit-scoped, topic=work_unit). But work-unit CANCEL (`manage-work-unit.md:236`, `remove --work-unit`) already removes all phases incl. discovery once `discovery` is in `INDEXED_PHASES`. Verify `knowledge remove --work-unit` with no `--phase` cascades to discovery chunks (it should via `removeByIdentity`/work-unit filter). Add a test in dd-4.
- **`discovery/briefs/` and `discovery/sessions/` dir creation** — `initialize-discovery.md` `mkdir` must create both (sessions in dd-1, briefs in dd-5).
- **Document-review scope** — `document-review.md` reconciles Exploration/Edits/Topics-Identified. With briefs as a new view, does document-review also reconcile the brief? Design says views regenerate freely (no append-only binding), so briefs should be OUT of document-review scope — confirm and state once.
- **Legacy epics with `description`-only discovery items** — dd-6 `read-brief-context.md` must fall back to `description` when `brief_path` is absent (legacy/migration-seeded/direct-start items never harvested a brief). Covered above; ensure the fallback is explicit so the unchanged path for un-harvested topics still works.
- **Single-phase log indexing** — design indexes EPIC discovery logs. Non-epic `session-001.md` logs: design says KB indexes discovery session logs as fallback for later phases. Decide whether non-epic logs are indexed too (topic=work_unit there as well). If yes, dd-4 indexing call must fire for single-phase finalisation (currently single-phase finalises via `first-phase-routing.md` §B + conclude, no harvest). Clarify scope in dd-4 — likely epic-only to match "discovery logs (records) … later phases," but state the decision.

lastPrompt: And you're absolutely right that we're not shrinking this by not over-complicate. I guess I misspoke really, but I definitely didn't mean trim the design in any way. Everything we've discussed is true…

aiTitle: Design exploration phase for epic brainstorming

content.text: Plan agent's validation is thorough and caught the load-bearing issues. I have everything. Writing the canonical plan now — synthesizing the design, the verified integration points, the 6-slice stack, the corrections (migration 045, non-epic path move, the `conclude-discovery` contradiction, mandatory `chunking/discovery.json`), and the gaps it surfaced.

input.content:
# Deep Discovery — Implementation Plan

## Context

**Problem.** Today, epic discovery is structurally shallow and closes down fast: it asks "what are the topics?" almost immediately, mirrors rather than challenges, and forbids substance ("don't tunnel in, no decisions"). The eager "ready to synthesise?" STOP gate keeps pushing toward topic-splitting. But for an epic — especially greenfield or a rebuild — you can't name topics before you've thought about the whole. The holistic, idea-level thinking has nowhere to live: discovery bans it, and per-topic research/discussion can't host it (no topics yet).

**Outcome.** Widen **epic** discovery into **deep discovery**: an open-ended, challenging, exploratory conversation where **topics are the OUTPUT, not the input** — synthesised on a user-initiated "harvest," never Claude-pushed. The other work types (feature/bugfix/quick-fix/cross-cutting) keep the current thin shape-and-route path, behaviour unchanged. This is **one feature delivered as a stack of dependency-ordered PRs** so each piece is independently reviewable.

This plan is the durable hand-off to the implementation session.

---

## The design (settled — implement, do not redesign)

- **Topics are the output.** User-pulled harvest; no Claude-pushed synthesis.
- **Stance fork (epic only).** Flip "mirror, not challenge" → collaborative **challenge/sparring** (opinionated, counter-framing — NOT interrogation or lecturing; still one live thread at a time). Allow substance (exploration, half-decisions, spikes).
- **Soft-by-location.** Discovery makes real decisions, but they are **soft** by virtue of where they live; hardening happens later in discussion. State this **once**; later phases infer it. Decisions are recorded in soft language ("leaning X because…"), never hedged-into-uselessness.
- **Harvest = user-pulled, arc-aware nudge.** Replace the eager STOP gate with an **ambient, non-blocking** nudge that surfaces only at the conversation's **convergence** (arc: diverge → tension → converge; convergence = "decoupled enough to silo"). Non-terminal and re-enterable.
- **Records vs views.** The session log is an **append-only, medium-fidelity NARRATIVE record** — log the reasoning-moves including dead-ends and rejected paths (not verbatim, not strong-summary). The **map** and per-topic **briefs** are recomputable **views**. Append-only binds records only; views regenerate freely (the log is the source of truth).
- **Briefs (the handoff).** At harvest, synthesis extracts each topic's **brief** — soft decisions + reasoning + rejected paths + open questions — while the whole exploration is in context. Stored at `.workflows/{wu}/discovery/briefs/{topic}.md`, manifest-tracked (`brief_path`), regenerated at each harvest that touches the topic. The brief is the topic's **read-in-full** seed for its research/discussion. Internally "brief"; downstream "discovery brief." **Do NOT reuse the word "seed"** (taken for inbox-promoted origin material).
- **Layout.** `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` (logs); `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` (views). A session is a **file**, not a directory; everything epic-scoped lives at `discovery/` level.
- **Continuity.** Re-entry reads prior session logs (map always + recent session(s) in full + older indexed / KB-on-demand), NOT just the map — multi-session discovery feels like one fluid process.
- **KB.** Index discovery session logs (records) under a new `discovery` phase as the full-fidelity fallback for later phases; topic = work_unit (a log spans many topics). **Epic-only** (non-epic single-phase logs are not indexed).
- **Propagation.** Late discovery knowledge regenerates briefs automatically (views); downstream research/discussion artifacts are **flagged to reconcile** (`reconcile_needed`), **never overwritten** — soft can't overwrite hard.

---

## Hard constraints

- **CONVENTIONS.md is mandatory.** Read `CONVENTIONS.md` IN FULL before editing any `SKILL.md` or reference file. Per-edit rules: prose economy (write as if always-there — **no "(new)"/historical markers**, cut WHY when WHAT suffices); five display tiers; every user-facing fenced block preceded by `> *Output the next fenced block as a code block:*` (or markdown variant); step markers `── Name ──`, sub-step `·· Name ··`; `**STOP.**` exact format; ZERO OUTPUT rule; H2 steps / H4 `#### If` conditionals; `→ Proceed/Return/Load` arrows only; reference-file header `*Reference for **[parent](../SKILL.md)***` + `---`.
- **Extract, don't inline.** New logic goes into **new reference files** (`harvest-nudge.md`, `continuity-load.md`, `brief-synthesis.md`, `read-brief-context.md`) so edits to delicate files (`session-loop.md`) shrink to Load-directive swaps. This is both a convention and the key mitigation for stack rebase pain.
- **Never run against the user's real `.workflows/`.** Copy a fixture work unit to the scratchpad/temp dir and exercise there.
- **Migration scripts:** idempotent, bash 3.2 (no `mapfile`/`declare -A`), direct manifest read/write via inline `node` (NEVER the manifest CLI), `report_update`/`report_skip`, `return 0`.

---

## The stack — 6 slices

Linear stack; each branch based on the previous. Use the `pr-stacked` skill + local `stack` CLI to land (squash-merge, root-first). Branch names illustrative.

| # | Branch | Depends on | Summary |
|---|--------|-----------|---------|
| 1 | `dd-1-sessions-layout` | main | Move logs `discovery/session-NNN.md` → `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` across ALL refs (epic **and** 4 non-epic entry points) + `discovery.cjs`. Migration **045** + test. Pure mechanical, no behaviour change. |
| 2 | `dd-2-conversation` | dd-1 | Stance fork (epic challenge + soft-by-location + allow substance), arc-aware nudge replacing the eager STOP gate, medium-fidelity append-only narrative log character. **No** re-entry work. |
| 3 | `dd-3-reentry` | dd-2 | Re-entry reads prior session logs (map + recent-in-full + older KB-on-demand). |
| 4 | `dd-4-kb-indexing` | dd-1 | Index discovery logs under a `discovery` phase: `src/knowledge` + `chunking/discovery.json` + finalize call site + **rewrite** `conclude-discovery.md` anti-pattern + **bundle rebuild** + tests. |
| 5 | `dd-5-briefs` | dd-3, dd-4 | Harvest → per-topic briefs (views); `brief_path`; regen-on-touch; merge/split/drop brief lifecycle; set downstream `reconcile_needed`. |
| 6 | `dd-6-downstream` | dd-5 | `read-brief-context.md`; research/discussion entry + init refs consume the brief; `brief_incorporated`; surface `reconcile_needed`. |

**Why this shape:** re-entry splits out of dd-2 because it edits the same fragile regions (`session-loop.md` §A, `SKILL.md` "Resuming"); separate review of conversation-character then continuity, with a cheap rebase since dd-3 strictly extends dd-2. KB (dd-4) lands before briefs (dd-5) because the brief's "pull older context on demand" fallback depends on indexed logs. Briefs stay producer (dd-5, discovery-internal) / consumer (dd-6, research+discussion entry) — different skill families and test surfaces. dd-1 is a pure mechanical move that must land first so every later slice rebases on the final path.

*(If you prefer fewer PRs, the natural merges are dd-2+dd-3 and dd-5+dd-6; dd-1 and dd-4 should stay isolated. See Open Decisions.)*

---

## Per-slice tasks

### dd-1 — sessions layout (mechanical)
Pattern: replace the literal `discovery/session-{NNN}.md` with `discovery/sessions/session-{NNN}.md` everywhere; add `sessions/` to the `mkdir`. Behaviour identical.
- **Discovery skill** (representative paths; grep for the rest): `references/template.md`, `references/initialize-discovery.md` (`mkdir -p …/discovery/sessions/`), `references/confirm-trigger.md`, `references/session-loop.md`, `references/confirm-and-persist.md`, `references/resume-detection.md`, `references/document-review.md`, `references/map-operations.md` (≈7× `git add` paths), `references/topic-synthesis.md`, `SKILL.md` ("Resuming" glob), `scripts/discovery.cjs` (`findLatestSessionLog` dir join).
- **Non-epic entry points (CRITICAL — the unchanged-path guard):** `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md:165`, `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md:147`, `skills/workflow-investigation-entry/SKILL.md:122`, `skills/workflow-scoping-entry/references/invoke-skill.md:21`. A missed one breaks non-epic seeding.
- **Migration** `skills/workflow-migrate/scripts/migrations/045-move-discovery-sessions.sh`: for each `.workflows/*/discovery/session-*.md`, `mkdir -p discovery/sessions/` and move the file in. Idempotent (skip if already under `sessions/`). Moves **all** work units incl. single-phase ones. No manifest rewrite (`active_session` holds only the NNN; the path is reconstructed in `discovery.cjs`).
- **Test** `tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`: happy, idempotent, no-op-when-moved, content preservation, multi-work-unit, single-phase work unit.
- **Reuse:** mirror the most recent migration `044-allow-workflows-mv.sh` + its test harness.

### dd-2 — the deep-discovery conversation
- `SKILL.md:30-31` ("Stay in your lane") — fork epic vs non-epic; epic allows substance + soft-by-location, non-epic keeps the thin lane. Keep the table; add the epic carve-out tightly.
- `references/discovery-guidelines.md` §B (line ~41, "Mirroring, not challenging") and §D (hard rules ~56-63) — fork for epic into collaborative challenge/sparring + soft-by-location. **State soft-by-location once, here.**
- `references/discovery-guidelines.md` §C (Endpoint Detection ~45-54) — recast into arc-aware convergence (diverge→tension→converge; convergence = decoupled-enough-to-silo); ambient, non-blocking, re-enterable.
- `references/session-loop.md` §C (~185-216) — **replace** the eager "Ready to synthesise?" STOP gate with the ambient nudge. Extract the arc-detection + nudge render into **NEW** `references/harvest-nudge.md`. Update §B natural-endpoint patterns to arc language.
- `references/template.md` (Exploration section ~51-56, anti-patterns ~115-116) — character shift to medium-fidelity narrative incl. dead-ends/rejected paths; soften "no decisions" for the soft-by-location epic case.
- **Convention nuance:** replacing the eager gate means **removing a STOP**. Re-read CONVENTIONS §Stop Gates + `SKILL.md:40-47` first — the nudge must be genuinely non-blocking, not a renamed STOP.

### dd-3 — re-entry continuity
- `references/session-loop.md` §A (~33-56, resume/refresh branch) — read prior session logs (map always + recent in full + older indexed/KB-on-demand), not just the active log.
- `SKILL.md` "Resuming After Context Refresh" (~51-60) — extend to read prior logs.
- `references/resume-detection.md` — continuity framing (still reads `active_session`; change is what gets loaded on resume).
- **NEW** `references/continuity-load.md` — which logs to read in full vs index vs KB-on-demand (extract; keep `session-loop.md` §A lean).
- `scripts/discovery.cjs` — add `listSessionLogs` (all session numbers + paths) alongside `findLatestSessionLog`. Additive, low-risk.

### dd-4 — KB indexing of discovery
- `src/knowledge/index.js`: add `'discovery'` to `INDEXED_PHASES` (~:22); add `discovery` to the phase regex enum (~:296); add a path branch for `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` → **topic = workUnit** (~:331 block).
- **NEW** `skills/workflow-knowledge/chunking/discovery.json` — mirror `research.json`; `"phase":"discovery"`, `"confidence":"low"`, split on the H2 headings. **Mandatory** — `index.js:498` throws without it.
- Finalize call site: `knowledge index .workflows/{wu}/discovery/sessions/session-{NNN}.md` at session finalisation (home: `confirm-and-persist.md` §C after Conclusion). Re-index each harvest (idempotent via identity removal).
- **REWRITE** `references/conclude-discovery.md:9-12` — it currently **forbids** `knowledge index` ("journey records, not retrievable"). Remove that anti-pattern and state logs are now indexed. Load-bearing contradiction — do not just append.
- **Bundle:** `npm run build` → regenerate and **commit** `skills/workflow-knowledge/scripts/knowledge.cjs` in the same PR (AGNTC installs the bundle, no build step).
- **Tests:** extend `tests/scripts/test-knowledge-*` for discovery-phase identity derivation + a `chunking/discovery.json` presence assertion; add a test that `knowledge remove --work-unit` cascades to discovery chunks.
- **Scope:** epic-only (non-epic single-phase logs not indexed) — state the decision.

### dd-5 — harvest → briefs (views)
- **NEW** `references/brief-synthesis.md` — at harvest, extract each topic's brief (soft decisions + reasoning + rejected paths + open questions) while the whole exploration is in context; write `.workflows/{wu}/discovery/briefs/{topic}.md`. Called from `references/topic-synthesis.md` §E.
- `references/confirm-and-persist.md` §A (~25-28) — after `create-discovery-topic`, set `brief_path` via a **separate** `manifest set {wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path "discovery/briefs/{topic}.md"` (opaque field; do NOT change the `manifest.cjs:849` builder).
- **Brief lifecycle at synthesis** (`topic-synthesis.md` §E adjust): split → write child briefs, drop parent's brief file + `brief_path`; merge → one brief for the merged topic, delete absorbed briefs; drop/remove → delete the orphaned brief file + clear `brief_path`. Regenerate-on-touch on re-harvest.
- **Propagation:** when a regenerated brief post-dates existing downstream work, set `reconcile_needed: true` on `{wu}.{research|discussion}.{topic}` (opaque field).
- `references/initialize-discovery.md` — `mkdir -p …/discovery/briefs/`.
- **Document-review scope:** briefs are views (regenerate freely) → **out** of `document-review.md` scope. State once.
- No brief backfill migration — briefs regenerate lazily at next harvest.

### dd-6 — downstream consumption + reconcile surfacing
- **NEW** `skills/workflow-shared/references/read-brief-context.md` (sibling to `seed-context.md`) — read `{wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path`, read the brief **in full**; **fall back to `description`** when `brief_path` is absent (legacy / migration-seeded / direct-start / un-harvested items). Set `brief_incorporated`.
- `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md` (epic branch ~197-205) and `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md` (epic branch ~179-187) — load `read-brief-context.md` instead of reading `description` directly.
- `skills/workflow-research-process/references/initialize-research.md` and `skills/workflow-discussion-process/references/initialize-discussion.md` — load `read-brief-context.md` for epic topics.
- **Reconcile UX:** when a downstream item has `reconcile_needed: true`, surface a `⚑` advisory at the entry Gather-Context step prompting reconciliation against the regenerated brief — **never auto-overwrite**. Clear `reconcile_needed` once addressed.

---

## Risks & hazards

- **Unchanged-non-epic-path guard (dd-1):** the path moves for ALL work types; 4 non-epic entry points + the migration must cover single-phase work units. A missed reader = broken non-epic seeding. Highest-risk item.
- **Shared-file churn (`session-loop.md` in dd-2/3/5; `SKILL.md` in dd-1/2/3):** strict ordering + extracting logic into new reference files keeps each rebase to Load-directive swaps. dd-1's `SKILL.md` edit = path string only; dd-3 adds the prior-log read.
- **`conclude-discovery.md` contradiction (dd-4):** must be rewritten, not appended.
- **KB bundle drift (dd-4):** `npm run build` and commit `knowledge.cjs` in the same PR.
- **`chunking/discovery.json` required (dd-4):** ship with the `INDEXED_PHASES`/regex change or indexing throws.
- **STOP-gate removal (dd-2):** ensure the nudge is genuinely non-blocking, not a renamed STOP; reconcile with the "don't invent stops" / ZERO OUTPUT rules.
- **Manifest opaque fields:** `brief_path` / `brief_incorporated` / `reconcile_needed` via dot-path `set`; do not touch the builder or add schema validation.

---

## Verification per slice

General: copy a fixture work unit to the scratchpad; run skills/CLI there. Use the engine sandbox (Mint copy) for conversation behaviour — screenshot evidence (TUI paste clips lines).

- **dd-1:** `bash tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`; full migration suite against a temp `.workflows/`; `node skills/workflow-discovery/scripts/discovery.cjs {wu}` against a fixture with logs under `sessions/`; `grep -rn "discovery/session" skills/ src/ | grep -v sessions` returns nothing.
- **dd-2:** sandbox epic discovery — eager gate gone, arc nudge surfaces only at convergence, non-blocking, re-enterable.
- **dd-3:** sandbox multi-session — refresh context, confirm re-entry reads prior logs; `listSessionLogs` returns all numbers.
- **dd-4:** `npm run build`; `tests/scripts/test-knowledge-cli.sh`, `test-knowledge-integration.cjs`, `test-knowledge-build.sh`; `knowledge index …/discovery/sessions/session-001.md` → non-zero chunks, `phase=discovery topic={wu}`; `git status` shows the rebuilt bundle.
- **dd-5:** sandbox harvest — `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` written per topic, `brief_path` set, second harvest regenerates + sets `reconcile_needed`; merge/split/drop deletes/writes the right brief files.
- **dd-6:** sandbox — enter a topic's research/discussion, brief read in full + `brief_incorporated` set; a `reconcile_needed` item surfaces `⚑` and overwrites nothing; legacy `description`-only topic still seeds.

Run the **full test suite** before landing each slice.

---

## Open decisions (recommendations — confirm or override)

1. **Stack granularity:** 6 slices as above (recommended for review-ease). Fallback: merge dd-2+dd-3 and dd-5+dd-6 for a 4-PR stack; keep dd-1 and dd-4 isolated.
2. **KB indexing scope:** epic-only (recommended — matches "records as fallback for later phases"; non-epic logs are thin shape-and-route).
3. **No brief backfill migration** (recommended — views regenerate lazily at next harvest).

toolUseResult.content:
# Deep Discovery — Implementation Plan

## Context

**Problem.** Today, epic discovery is structurally shallow and closes down fast: it asks "what are the topics?" almost immediately, mirrors rather than challenges, and forbids substance ("don't tunnel in, no decisions"). The eager "ready to synthesise?" STOP gate keeps pushing toward topic-splitting. But for an epic — especially greenfield or a rebuild — you can't name topics before you've thought about the whole. The holistic, idea-level thinking has nowhere to live: discovery bans it, and per-topic research/discussion can't host it (no topics yet).

**Outcome.** Widen **epic** discovery into **deep discovery**: an open-ended, challenging, exploratory conversation where **topics are the OUTPUT, not the input** — synthesised on a user-initiated "harvest," never Claude-pushed. The other work types (feature/bugfix/quick-fix/cross-cutting) keep the current thin shape-and-route path, behaviour unchanged. This is **one feature delivered as a stack of dependency-ordered PRs** so each piece is independently reviewable.

This plan is the durable hand-off to the implementation session.

---

## The design (settled — implement, do not redesign)

- **Topics are the output.** User-pulled harvest; no Claude-pushed synthesis.
- **Stance fork (epic only).** Flip "mirror, not challenge" → collaborative **challenge/sparring** (opinionated, counter-framing — NOT interrogation or lecturing; still one live thread at a time). Allow substance (exploration, half-decisions, spikes).
- **Soft-by-location.** Discovery makes real decisions, but they are **soft** by virtue of where they live; hardening happens later in discussion. State this **once**; later phases infer it. Decisions are recorded in soft language ("leaning X because…"), never hedged-into-uselessness.
- **Harvest = user-pulled, arc-aware nudge.** Replace the eager STOP gate with an **ambient, non-blocking** nudge that surfaces only at the conversation's **convergence** (arc: diverge → tension → converge; convergence = "decoupled enough to silo"). Non-terminal and re-enterable.
- **Records vs views.** The session log is an **append-only, medium-fidelity NARRATIVE record** — log the reasoning-moves including dead-ends and rejected paths (not verbatim, not strong-summary). The **map** and per-topic **briefs** are recomputable **views**. Append-only binds records only; views regenerate freely (the log is the source of truth).
- **Briefs (the handoff).** At harvest, synthesis extracts each topic's **brief** — soft decisions + reasoning + rejected paths + open questions — while the whole exploration is in context. Stored at `.workflows/{wu}/discovery/briefs/{topic}.md`, manifest-tracked (`brief_path`), regenerated at each harvest that touches the topic. The brief is the topic's **read-in-full** seed for its research/discussion. Internally "brief"; downstream "discovery brief." **Do NOT reuse the word "seed"** (taken for inbox-promoted origin material).
- **Layout.** `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` (logs); `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` (views). A session is a **file**, not a directory; everything epic-scoped lives at `discovery/` level.
- **Continuity.** Re-entry reads prior session logs (map always + recent session(s) in full + older indexed / KB-on-demand), NOT just the map — multi-session discovery feels like one fluid process.
- **KB.** Index discovery session logs (records) under a new `discovery` phase as the full-fidelity fallback for later phases; topic = work_unit (a log spans many topics). **Epic-only** (non-epic single-phase logs are not indexed).
- **Propagation.** Late discovery knowledge regenerates briefs automatically (views); downstream research/discussion artifacts are **flagged to reconcile** (`reconcile_needed`), **never overwritten** — soft can't overwrite hard.

---

## Hard constraints

- **CONVENTIONS.md is mandatory.** Read `CONVENTIONS.md` IN FULL before editing any `SKILL.md` or reference file. Per-edit rules: prose economy (write as if always-there — **no "(new)"/historical markers**, cut WHY when WHAT suffices); five display tiers; every user-facing fenced block preceded by `> *Output the next fenced block as a code block:*` (or markdown variant); step markers `── Name ──`, sub-step `·· Name ··`; `**STOP.**` exact format; ZERO OUTPUT rule; H2 steps / H4 `#### If` conditionals; `→ Proceed/Return/Load` arrows only; reference-file header `*Reference for **[parent](../SKILL.md)***` + `---`.
- **Extract, don't inline.** New logic goes into **new reference files** (`harvest-nudge.md`, `continuity-load.md`, `brief-synthesis.md`, `read-brief-context.md`) so edits to delicate files (`session-loop.md`) shrink to Load-directive swaps. This is both a convention and the key mitigation for stack rebase pain.
- **Never run against the user's real `.workflows/`.** Copy a fixture work unit to the scratchpad/temp dir and exercise there.
- **Migration scripts:** idempotent, bash 3.2 (no `mapfile`/`declare -A`), direct manifest read/write via inline `node` (NEVER the manifest CLI), `report_update`/`report_skip`, `return 0`.

---

## The stack — 6 slices

Linear stack; each branch based on the previous. Use the `pr-stacked` skill + local `stack` CLI to land (squash-merge, root-first). Branch names illustrative.

| # | Branch | Depends on | Summary |
|---|--------|-----------|---------|
| 1 | `dd-1-sessions-layout` | main | Move logs `discovery/session-NNN.md` → `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` across ALL refs (epic **and** 4 non-epic entry points) + `discovery.cjs`. Migration **045** + test. Pure mechanical, no behaviour change. |
| 2 | `dd-2-conversation` | dd-1 | Stance fork (epic challenge + soft-by-location + allow substance), arc-aware nudge replacing the eager STOP gate, medium-fidelity append-only narrative log character. **No** re-entry work. |
| 3 | `dd-3-reentry` | dd-2 | Re-entry reads prior session logs (map + recent-in-full + older KB-on-demand). |
| 4 | `dd-4-kb-indexing` | dd-1 | Index discovery logs under a `discovery` phase: `src/knowledge` + `chunking/discovery.json` + finalize call site + **rewrite** `conclude-discovery.md` anti-pattern + **bundle rebuild** + tests. |
| 5 | `dd-5-briefs` | dd-3, dd-4 | Harvest → per-topic briefs (views); `brief_path`; regen-on-touch; merge/split/drop brief lifecycle; set downstream `reconcile_needed`. |
| 6 | `dd-6-downstream` | dd-5 | `read-brief-context.md`; research/discussion entry + init refs consume the brief; `brief_incorporated`; surface `reconcile_needed`. |

**Why this shape:** re-entry splits out of dd-2 because it edits the same fragile regions (`session-loop.md` §A, `SKILL.md` "Resuming"); separate review of conversation-character then continuity, with a cheap rebase since dd-3 strictly extends dd-2. KB (dd-4) lands before briefs (dd-5) because the brief's "pull older context on demand" fallback depends on indexed logs. Briefs stay producer (dd-5, discovery-internal) / consumer (dd-6, research+discussion entry) — different skill families and test surfaces. dd-1 is a pure mechanical move that must land first so every later slice rebases on the final path.

*(If you prefer fewer PRs, the natural merges are dd-2+dd-3 and dd-5+dd-6; dd-1 and dd-4 should stay isolated. See Open Decisions.)*

---

## Per-slice tasks

### dd-1 — sessions layout (mechanical)
Pattern: replace the literal `discovery/session-{NNN}.md` with `discovery/sessions/session-{NNN}.md` everywhere; add `sessions/` to the `mkdir`. Behaviour identical.
- **Discovery skill** (representative paths; grep for the rest): `references/template.md`, `references/initialize-discovery.md` (`mkdir -p …/discovery/sessions/`), `references/confirm-trigger.md`, `references/session-loop.md`, `references/confirm-and-persist.md`, `references/resume-detection.md`, `references/document-review.md`, `references/map-operations.md` (≈7× `git add` paths), `references/topic-synthesis.md`, `SKILL.md` ("Resuming" glob), `scripts/discovery.cjs` (`findLatestSessionLog` dir join).
- **Non-epic entry points (CRITICAL — the unchanged-path guard):** `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md:165`, `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md:147`, `skills/workflow-investigation-entry/SKILL.md:122`, `skills/workflow-scoping-entry/references/invoke-skill.md:21`. A missed one breaks non-epic seeding.
- **Migration** `skills/workflow-migrate/scripts/migrations/045-move-discovery-sessions.sh`: for each `.workflows/*/discovery/session-*.md`, `mkdir -p discovery/sessions/` and move the file in. Idempotent (skip if already under `sessions/`). Moves **all** work units incl. single-phase ones. No manifest rewrite (`active_session` holds only the NNN; the path is reconstructed in `discovery.cjs`).
- **Test** `tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`: happy, idempotent, no-op-when-moved, content preservation, multi-work-unit, single-phase work unit.
- **Reuse:** mirror the most recent migration `044-allow-workflows-mv.sh` + its test harness.

### dd-2 — the deep-discovery conversation
- `SKILL.md:30-31` ("Stay in your lane") — fork epic vs non-epic; epic allows substance + soft-by-location, non-epic keeps the thin lane. Keep the table; add the epic carve-out tightly.
- `references/discovery-guidelines.md` §B (line ~41, "Mirroring, not challenging") and §D (hard rules ~56-63) — fork for epic into collaborative challenge/sparring + soft-by-location. **State soft-by-location once, here.**
- `references/discovery-guidelines.md` §C (Endpoint Detection ~45-54) — recast into arc-aware convergence (diverge→tension→converge; convergence = decoupled-enough-to-silo); ambient, non-blocking, re-enterable.
- `references/session-loop.md` §C (~185-216) — **replace** the eager "Ready to synthesise?" STOP gate with the ambient nudge. Extract the arc-detection + nudge render into **NEW** `references/harvest-nudge.md`. Update §B natural-endpoint patterns to arc language.
- `references/template.md` (Exploration section ~51-56, anti-patterns ~115-116) — character shift to medium-fidelity narrative incl. dead-ends/rejected paths; soften "no decisions" for the soft-by-location epic case.
- **Convention nuance:** replacing the eager gate means **removing a STOP**. Re-read CONVENTIONS §Stop Gates + `SKILL.md:40-47` first — the nudge must be genuinely non-blocking, not a renamed STOP.

### dd-3 — re-entry continuity
- `references/session-loop.md` §A (~33-56, resume/refresh branch) — read prior session logs (map always + recent in full + older indexed/KB-on-demand), not just the active log.
- `SKILL.md` "Resuming After Context Refresh" (~51-60) — extend to read prior logs.
- `references/resume-detection.md` — continuity framing (still reads `active_session`; change is what gets loaded on resume).
- **NEW** `references/continuity-load.md` — which logs to read in full vs index vs KB-on-demand (extract; keep `session-loop.md` §A lean).
- `scripts/discovery.cjs` — add `listSessionLogs` (all session numbers + paths) alongside `findLatestSessionLog`. Additive, low-risk.

### dd-4 — KB indexing of discovery
- `src/knowledge/index.js`: add `'discovery'` to `INDEXED_PHASES` (~:22); add `discovery` to the phase regex enum (~:296); add a path branch for `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` → **topic = workUnit** (~:331 block).
- **NEW** `skills/workflow-knowledge/chunking/discovery.json` — mirror `research.json`; `"phase":"discovery"`, `"confidence":"low"`, split on the H2 headings. **Mandatory** — `index.js:498` throws without it.
- Finalize call site: `knowledge index .workflows/{wu}/discovery/sessions/session-{NNN}.md` at session finalisation (home: `confirm-and-persist.md` §C after Conclusion). Re-index each harvest (idempotent via identity removal).
- **REWRITE** `references/conclude-discovery.md:9-12` — it currently **forbids** `knowledge index` ("journey records, not retrievable"). Remove that anti-pattern and state logs are now indexed. Load-bearing contradiction — do not just append.
- **Bundle:** `npm run build` → regenerate and **commit** `skills/workflow-knowledge/scripts/knowledge.cjs` in the same PR (AGNTC installs the bundle, no build step).
- **Tests:** extend `tests/scripts/test-knowledge-*` for discovery-phase identity derivation + a `chunking/discovery.json` presence assertion; add a test that `knowledge remove --work-unit` cascades to discovery chunks.
- **Scope:** epic-only (non-epic single-phase logs not indexed) — state the decision.

### dd-5 — harvest → briefs (views)
- **NEW** `references/brief-synthesis.md` — at harvest, extract each topic's brief (soft decisions + reasoning + rejected paths + open questions) while the whole exploration is in context; write `.workflows/{wu}/discovery/briefs/{topic}.md`. Called from `references/topic-synthesis.md` §E.
- `references/confirm-and-persist.md` §A (~25-28) — after `create-discovery-topic`, set `brief_path` via a **separate** `manifest set {wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path "discovery/briefs/{topic}.md"` (opaque field; do NOT change the `manifest.cjs:849` builder).
- **Brief lifecycle at synthesis** (`topic-synthesis.md` §E adjust): split → write child briefs, drop parent's brief file + `brief_path`; merge → one brief for the merged topic, delete absorbed briefs; drop/remove → delete the orphaned brief file + clear `brief_path`. Regenerate-on-touch on re-harvest.
- **Propagation:** when a regenerated brief post-dates existing downstream work, set `reconcile_needed: true` on `{wu}.{research|discussion}.{topic}` (opaque field).
- `references/initialize-discovery.md` — `mkdir -p …/discovery/briefs/`.
- **Document-review scope:** briefs are views (regenerate freely) → **out** of `document-review.md` scope. State once.
- No brief backfill migration — briefs regenerate lazily at next harvest.

### dd-6 — downstream consumption + reconcile surfacing
- **NEW** `skills/workflow-shared/references/read-brief-context.md` (sibling to `seed-context.md`) — read `{wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path`, read the brief **in full**; **fall back to `description`** when `brief_path` is absent (legacy / migration-seeded / direct-start / un-harvested items). Set `brief_incorporated`.
- `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md` (epic branch ~197-205) and `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md` (epic branch ~179-187) — load `read-brief-context.md` instead of reading `description` directly.
- `skills/workflow-research-process/references/initialize-research.md` and `skills/workflow-discussion-process/references/initialize-discussion.md` — load `read-brief-context.md` for epic topics.
- **Reconcile UX:** when a downstream item has `reconcile_needed: true`, surface a `⚑` advisory at the entry Gather-Context step prompting reconciliation against the regenerated brief — **never auto-overwrite**. Clear `reconcile_needed` once addressed.

---

## Risks & hazards

- **Unchanged-non-epic-path guard (dd-1):** the path moves for ALL work types; 4 non-epic entry points + the migration must cover single-phase work units. A missed reader = broken non-epic seeding. Highest-risk item.
- **Shared-file churn (`session-loop.md` in dd-2/3/5; `SKILL.md` in dd-1/2/3):** strict ordering + extracting logic into new reference files keeps each rebase to Load-directive swaps. dd-1's `SKILL.md` edit = path string only; dd-3 adds the prior-log read.
- **`conclude-discovery.md` contradiction (dd-4):** must be rewritten, not appended.
- **KB bundle drift (dd-4):** `npm run build` and commit `knowledge.cjs` in the same PR.
- **`chunking/discovery.json` required (dd-4):** ship with the `INDEXED_PHASES`/regex change or indexing throws.
- **STOP-gate removal (dd-2):** ensure the nudge is genuinely non-blocking, not a renamed STOP; reconcile with the "don't invent stops" / ZERO OUTPUT rules.
- **Manifest opaque fields:** `brief_path` / `brief_incorporated` / `reconcile_needed` via dot-path `set`; do not touch the builder or add schema validation.

---

## Verification per slice

General: copy a fixture work unit to the scratchpad; run skills/CLI there. Use the engine sandbox (Mint copy) for conversation behaviour — screenshot evidence (TUI paste clips lines).

- **dd-1:** `bash tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`; full migration suite against a temp `.workflows/`; `node skills/workflow-discovery/scripts/discovery.cjs {wu}` against a fixture with logs under `sessions/`; `grep -rn "discovery/session" skills/ src/ | grep -v sessions` returns nothing.
- **dd-2:** sandbox epic discovery — eager gate gone, arc nudge surfaces only at convergence, non-blocking, re-enterable.
- **dd-3:** sandbox multi-session — refresh context, confirm re-entry reads prior logs; `listSessionLogs` returns all numbers.
- **dd-4:** `npm run build`; `tests/scripts/test-knowledge-cli.sh`, `test-knowledge-integration.cjs`, `test-knowledge-build.sh`; `knowledge index …/discovery/sessions/session-001.md` → non-zero chunks, `phase=discovery topic={wu}`; `git status` shows the rebuilt bundle.
- **dd-5:** sandbox harvest — `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` written per topic, `brief_path` set, second harvest regenerates + sets `reconcile_needed`; merge/split/drop deletes/writes the right brief files.
- **dd-6:** sandbox — enter a topic's research/discussion, brief read in full + `brief_incorporated` set; a `reconcile_needed` item surfaces `⚑` and overwrites nothing; legacy `description`-only topic still seeds.

Run the **full test suite** before landing each slice.

---

## Open decisions (recommendations — confirm or override)

1. **Stack granularity:** 6 slices as above (recommended for review-ease). Fallback: merge dd-2+dd-3 and dd-5+dd-6 for a 4-PR stack; keep dd-1 and dd-4 isolated.
2. **KB indexing scope:** epic-only (recommended — matches "records as fallback for later phases"; non-epic logs are thin shape-and-route).
3. **No brief backfill migration** (recommended — views regenerate lazily at next harvest).

input.plan:
# Deep Discovery — Implementation Plan

## Context

**Problem.** Today, epic discovery is structurally shallow and closes down fast: it asks "what are the topics?" almost immediately, mirrors rather than challenges, and forbids substance ("don't tunnel in, no decisions"). The eager "ready to synthesise?" STOP gate keeps pushing toward topic-splitting. But for an epic — especially greenfield or a rebuild — you can't name topics before you've thought about the whole. The holistic, idea-level thinking has nowhere to live: discovery bans it, and per-topic research/discussion can't host it (no topics yet).

**Outcome.** Widen **epic** discovery into **deep discovery**: an open-ended, challenging, exploratory conversation where **topics are the OUTPUT, not the input** — synthesised on a user-initiated "harvest," never Claude-pushed. The other work types (feature/bugfix/quick-fix/cross-cutting) keep the current thin shape-and-route path, behaviour unchanged. This is **one feature delivered as a stack of dependency-ordered PRs** so each piece is independently reviewable.

This plan is the durable hand-off to the implementation session.

---

## The design (settled — implement, do not redesign)

- **Topics are the output.** User-pulled harvest; no Claude-pushed synthesis.
- **Stance fork (epic only).** Flip "mirror, not challenge" → collaborative **challenge/sparring** (opinionated, counter-framing — NOT interrogation or lecturing; still one live thread at a time). Allow substance (exploration, half-decisions, spikes).
- **Soft-by-location.** Discovery makes real decisions, but they are **soft** by virtue of where they live; hardening happens later in discussion. State this **once**; later phases infer it. Decisions are recorded in soft language ("leaning X because…"), never hedged-into-uselessness.
- **Harvest = user-pulled, arc-aware nudge.** Replace the eager STOP gate with an **ambient, non-blocking** nudge that surfaces only at the conversation's **convergence** (arc: diverge → tension → converge; convergence = "decoupled enough to silo"). Non-terminal and re-enterable.
- **Records vs views.** The session log is an **append-only, medium-fidelity NARRATIVE record** — log the reasoning-moves including dead-ends and rejected paths (not verbatim, not strong-summary). The **map** and per-topic **briefs** are recomputable **views**. Append-only binds records only; views regenerate freely (the log is the source of truth).
- **Briefs (the handoff).** At harvest, synthesis extracts each topic's **brief** — soft decisions + reasoning + rejected paths + open questions — while the whole exploration is in context. Stored at `.workflows/{wu}/discovery/briefs/{topic}.md`, manifest-tracked (`brief_path`), regenerated at each harvest that touches the topic. The brief is the topic's **read-in-full** seed for its research/discussion. Internally "brief"; downstream "discovery brief." **Do NOT reuse the word "seed"** (taken for inbox-promoted origin material).
- **Layout.** `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` (logs); `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` (views). A session is a **file**, not a directory; everything epic-scoped lives at `discovery/` level.
- **Continuity.** Re-entry reads prior session logs (map always + recent session(s) in full + older indexed / KB-on-demand), NOT just the map — multi-session discovery feels like one fluid process.
- **KB.** Index discovery session logs (records) under a new `discovery` phase as the full-fidelity fallback for later phases; topic = work_unit (a log spans many topics). **Epic-only** (non-epic single-phase logs are not indexed).
- **Propagation.** Late discovery knowledge regenerates briefs automatically (views); downstream research/discussion artifacts are **flagged to reconcile** (`reconcile_needed`), **never overwritten** — soft can't overwrite hard.

---

## Hard constraints

- **CONVENTIONS.md is mandatory.** Read `CONVENTIONS.md` IN FULL before editing any `SKILL.md` or reference file. Per-edit rules: prose economy (write as if always-there — **no "(new)"/historical markers**, cut WHY when WHAT suffices); five display tiers; every user-facing fenced block preceded by `> *Output the next fenced block as a code block:*` (or markdown variant); step markers `── Name ──`, sub-step `·· Name ··`; `**STOP.**` exact format; ZERO OUTPUT rule; H2 steps / H4 `#### If` conditionals; `→ Proceed/Return/Load` arrows only; reference-file header `*Reference for **[parent](../SKILL.md)***` + `---`.
- **Extract, don't inline.** New logic goes into **new reference files** (`harvest-nudge.md`, `continuity-load.md`, `brief-synthesis.md`, `read-brief-context.md`) so edits to delicate files (`session-loop.md`) shrink to Load-directive swaps. This is both a convention and the key mitigation for stack rebase pain.
- **Never run against the user's real `.workflows/`.** Copy a fixture work unit to the scratchpad/temp dir and exercise there.
- **Migration scripts:** idempotent, bash 3.2 (no `mapfile`/`declare -A`), direct manifest read/write via inline `node` (NEVER the manifest CLI), `report_update`/`report_skip`, `return 0`.

---

## The stack — 6 slices

Linear stack; each branch based on the previous. Use the `pr-stacked` skill + local `stack` CLI to land (squash-merge, root-first). Branch names illustrative.

| # | Branch | Depends on | Summary |
|---|--------|-----------|---------|
| 1 | `dd-1-sessions-layout` | main | Move logs `discovery/session-NNN.md` → `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` across ALL refs (epic **and** 4 non-epic entry points) + `discovery.cjs`. Migration **045** + test. Pure mechanical, no behaviour change. |
| 2 | `dd-2-conversation` | dd-1 | Stance fork (epic challenge + soft-by-location + allow substance), arc-aware nudge replacing the eager STOP gate, medium-fidelity append-only narrative log character. **No** re-entry work. |
| 3 | `dd-3-reentry` | dd-2 | Re-entry reads prior session logs (map + recent-in-full + older KB-on-demand). |
| 4 | `dd-4-kb-indexing` | dd-1 | Index discovery logs under a `discovery` phase: `src/knowledge` + `chunking/discovery.json` + finalize call site + **rewrite** `conclude-discovery.md` anti-pattern + **bundle rebuild** + tests. |
| 5 | `dd-5-briefs` | dd-3, dd-4 | Harvest → per-topic briefs (views); `brief_path`; regen-on-touch; merge/split/drop brief lifecycle; set downstream `reconcile_needed`. |
| 6 | `dd-6-downstream` | dd-5 | `read-brief-context.md`; research/discussion entry + init refs consume the brief; `brief_incorporated`; surface `reconcile_needed`. |

**Why this shape:** re-entry splits out of dd-2 because it edits the same fragile regions (`session-loop.md` §A, `SKILL.md` "Resuming"); separate review of conversation-character then continuity, with a cheap rebase since dd-3 strictly extends dd-2. KB (dd-4) lands before briefs (dd-5) because the brief's "pull older context on demand" fallback depends on indexed logs. Briefs stay producer (dd-5, discovery-internal) / consumer (dd-6, research+discussion entry) — different skill families and test surfaces. dd-1 is a pure mechanical move that must land first so every later slice rebases on the final path.

*(If you prefer fewer PRs, the natural merges are dd-2+dd-3 and dd-5+dd-6; dd-1 and dd-4 should stay isolated. See Open Decisions.)*

---

## Per-slice tasks

### dd-1 — sessions layout (mechanical)
Pattern: replace the literal `discovery/session-{NNN}.md` with `discovery/sessions/session-{NNN}.md` everywhere; add `sessions/` to the `mkdir`. Behaviour identical.
- **Discovery skill** (representative paths; grep for the rest): `references/template.md`, `references/initialize-discovery.md` (`mkdir -p …/discovery/sessions/`), `references/confirm-trigger.md`, `references/session-loop.md`, `references/confirm-and-persist.md`, `references/resume-detection.md`, `references/document-review.md`, `references/map-operations.md` (≈7× `git add` paths), `references/topic-synthesis.md`, `SKILL.md` ("Resuming" glob), `scripts/discovery.cjs` (`findLatestSessionLog` dir join).
- **Non-epic entry points (CRITICAL — the unchanged-path guard):** `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md:165`, `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md:147`, `skills/workflow-investigation-entry/SKILL.md:122`, `skills/workflow-scoping-entry/references/invoke-skill.md:21`. A missed one breaks non-epic seeding.
- **Migration** `skills/workflow-migrate/scripts/migrations/045-move-discovery-sessions.sh`: for each `.workflows/*/discovery/session-*.md`, `mkdir -p discovery/sessions/` and move the file in. Idempotent (skip if already under `sessions/`). Moves **all** work units incl. single-phase ones. No manifest rewrite (`active_session` holds only the NNN; the path is reconstructed in `discovery.cjs`).
- **Test** `tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`: happy, idempotent, no-op-when-moved, content preservation, multi-work-unit, single-phase work unit.
- **Reuse:** mirror the most recent migration `044-allow-workflows-mv.sh` + its test harness.

### dd-2 — the deep-discovery conversation
- `SKILL.md:30-31` ("Stay in your lane") — fork epic vs non-epic; epic allows substance + soft-by-location, non-epic keeps the thin lane. Keep the table; add the epic carve-out tightly.
- `references/discovery-guidelines.md` §B (line ~41, "Mirroring, not challenging") and §D (hard rules ~56-63) — fork for epic into collaborative challenge/sparring + soft-by-location. **State soft-by-location once, here.**
- `references/discovery-guidelines.md` §C (Endpoint Detection ~45-54) — recast into arc-aware convergence (diverge→tension→converge; convergence = decoupled-enough-to-silo); ambient, non-blocking, re-enterable.
- `references/session-loop.md` §C (~185-216) — **replace** the eager "Ready to synthesise?" STOP gate with the ambient nudge. Extract the arc-detection + nudge render into **NEW** `references/harvest-nudge.md`. Update §B natural-endpoint patterns to arc language.
- `references/template.md` (Exploration section ~51-56, anti-patterns ~115-116) — character shift to medium-fidelity narrative incl. dead-ends/rejected paths; soften "no decisions" for the soft-by-location epic case.
- **Convention nuance:** replacing the eager gate means **removing a STOP**. Re-read CONVENTIONS §Stop Gates + `SKILL.md:40-47` first — the nudge must be genuinely non-blocking, not a renamed STOP.

### dd-3 — re-entry continuity
- `references/session-loop.md` §A (~33-56, resume/refresh branch) — read prior session logs (map always + recent in full + older indexed/KB-on-demand), not just the active log.
- `SKILL.md` "Resuming After Context Refresh" (~51-60) — extend to read prior logs.
- `references/resume-detection.md` — continuity framing (still reads `active_session`; change is what gets loaded on resume).
- **NEW** `references/continuity-load.md` — which logs to read in full vs index vs KB-on-demand (extract; keep `session-loop.md` §A lean).
- `scripts/discovery.cjs` — add `listSessionLogs` (all session numbers + paths) alongside `findLatestSessionLog`. Additive, low-risk.

### dd-4 — KB indexing of discovery
- `src/knowledge/index.js`: add `'discovery'` to `INDEXED_PHASES` (~:22); add `discovery` to the phase regex enum (~:296); add a path branch for `discovery/sessions/session-NNN.md` → **topic = workUnit** (~:331 block).
- **NEW** `skills/workflow-knowledge/chunking/discovery.json` — mirror `research.json`; `"phase":"discovery"`, `"confidence":"low"`, split on the H2 headings. **Mandatory** — `index.js:498` throws without it.
- Finalize call site: `knowledge index .workflows/{wu}/discovery/sessions/session-{NNN}.md` at session finalisation (home: `confirm-and-persist.md` §C after Conclusion). Re-index each harvest (idempotent via identity removal).
- **REWRITE** `references/conclude-discovery.md:9-12` — it currently **forbids** `knowledge index` ("journey records, not retrievable"). Remove that anti-pattern and state logs are now indexed. Load-bearing contradiction — do not just append.
- **Bundle:** `npm run build` → regenerate and **commit** `skills/workflow-knowledge/scripts/knowledge.cjs` in the same PR (AGNTC installs the bundle, no build step).
- **Tests:** extend `tests/scripts/test-knowledge-*` for discovery-phase identity derivation + a `chunking/discovery.json` presence assertion; add a test that `knowledge remove --work-unit` cascades to discovery chunks.
- **Scope:** epic-only (non-epic single-phase logs not indexed) — state the decision.

### dd-5 — harvest → briefs (views)
- **NEW** `references/brief-synthesis.md` — at harvest, extract each topic's brief (soft decisions + reasoning + rejected paths + open questions) while the whole exploration is in context; write `.workflows/{wu}/discovery/briefs/{topic}.md`. Called from `references/topic-synthesis.md` §E.
- `references/confirm-and-persist.md` §A (~25-28) — after `create-discovery-topic`, set `brief_path` via a **separate** `manifest set {wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path "discovery/briefs/{topic}.md"` (opaque field; do NOT change the `manifest.cjs:849` builder).
- **Brief lifecycle at synthesis** (`topic-synthesis.md` §E adjust): split → write child briefs, drop parent's brief file + `brief_path`; merge → one brief for the merged topic, delete absorbed briefs; drop/remove → delete the orphaned brief file + clear `brief_path`. Regenerate-on-touch on re-harvest.
- **Propagation:** when a regenerated brief post-dates existing downstream work, set `reconcile_needed: true` on `{wu}.{research|discussion}.{topic}` (opaque field).
- `references/initialize-discovery.md` — `mkdir -p …/discovery/briefs/`.
- **Document-review scope:** briefs are views (regenerate freely) → **out** of `document-review.md` scope. State once.
- No brief backfill migration — briefs regenerate lazily at next harvest.

### dd-6 — downstream consumption + reconcile surfacing
- **NEW** `skills/workflow-shared/references/read-brief-context.md` (sibling to `seed-context.md`) — read `{wu}.discovery.{topic} brief_path`, read the brief **in full**; **fall back to `description`** when `brief_path` is absent (legacy / migration-seeded / direct-start / un-harvested items). Set `brief_incorporated`.
- `skills/workflow-research-entry/SKILL.md` (epic branch ~197-205) and `skills/workflow-discussion-entry/SKILL.md` (epic branch ~179-187) — load `read-brief-context.md` instead of reading `description` directly.
- `skills/workflow-research-process/references/initialize-research.md` and `skills/workflow-discussion-process/references/initialize-discussion.md` — load `read-brief-context.md` for epic topics.
- **Reconcile UX:** when a downstream item has `reconcile_needed: true`, surface a `⚑` advisory at the entry Gather-Context step prompting reconciliation against the regenerated brief — **never auto-overwrite**. Clear `reconcile_needed` once addressed.

---

## Risks & hazards

- **Unchanged-non-epic-path guard (dd-1):** the path moves for ALL work types; 4 non-epic entry points + the migration must cover single-phase work units. A missed reader = broken non-epic seeding. Highest-risk item.
- **Shared-file churn (`session-loop.md` in dd-2/3/5; `SKILL.md` in dd-1/2/3):** strict ordering + extracting logic into new reference files keeps each rebase to Load-directive swaps. dd-1's `SKILL.md` edit = path string only; dd-3 adds the prior-log read.
- **`conclude-discovery.md` contradiction (dd-4):** must be rewritten, not appended.
- **KB bundle drift (dd-4):** `npm run build` and commit `knowledge.cjs` in the same PR.
- **`chunking/discovery.json` required (dd-4):** ship with the `INDEXED_PHASES`/regex change or indexing throws.
- **STOP-gate removal (dd-2):** ensure the nudge is genuinely non-blocking, not a renamed STOP; reconcile with the "don't invent stops" / ZERO OUTPUT rules.
- **Manifest opaque fields:** `brief_path` / `brief_incorporated` / `reconcile_needed` via dot-path `set`; do not touch the builder or add schema validation.

---

## Verification per slice

General: copy a fixture work unit to the scratchpad; run skills/CLI there. Use the engine sandbox (Mint copy) for conversation behaviour — screenshot evidence (TUI paste clips lines).

- **dd-1:** `bash tests/scripts/test-migration-045.sh`; full migration suite against a temp `.workflows/`; `node skills/workflow-discovery/scripts/discovery.cjs {wu}` against a fixture with logs under `sessions/`; `grep -rn "discovery/session" skills/ src/ | grep -v sessions` returns nothing.
- **dd-2:** sandbox epic discovery — eager gate gone, arc nudge surfaces only at convergence, non-blocking, re-enterable.
- **dd-3:** sandbox multi-session — refresh context, confirm re-entry reads prior logs; `listSessionLogs` returns all numbers.
- **dd-4:** `npm run build`; `tests/scripts/test-knowledge-cli.sh`, `test-knowledge-integration.cjs`, `test-knowledge-build.sh`; `knowledge index …/discovery/sessions/session-001.md` → non-zero chunks, `phase=discovery topic={wu}`; `git status` shows the rebuilt bundle.
- **dd-5:** sandbox harvest — `discovery/briefs/{topic}.md` written per topic, `brief_path` set, second harvest regenerates + sets `reconcile_needed`; merge/split/drop deletes/writes the right brief files.
- **dd-6:** sandbox — enter a topic's research/discussion, brief read in full + `brief_incorporated` set; a `reconcile_needed` item surfaces `⚑` and overwrites nothing; legacy `description`-only topic still seeds.

Run the **full test suite** before landing each slice.

---

## Open decisions (recommendations — confirm or override)

1. **Stack granularity:** 6 slices as above — **confirmed** (chosen for per-PR review clarity).
2. **KB indexing scope:** epic-only (recommended — matches "records as fallback for later phases"; non-epic logs are thin shape-and-route).
3. **No brief backfill migration** (recommended — views regenerate lazily at next harvest).
